headline: Why Johnson & Johnson May Be the Closest Thing Investors Can Find to a Bulletproof Dividend Stock
summary: Johnson & Johnson takes a licking, and the dividend keeps on ticking higher.

headline: These Investors Earned 20% to 33% Returns Using The Same Philosophy on Completely Different Stocks
summary: The Investing for Beginners Podcast recently revisited one of the most influential ideas in modern finance. That was Benjamin Graham’s concept of buying with a margin of safety. In fact, according to host Andrew Sather, Graham’s Columbia students went on to compound capital at extraordinary rates using the same principles applied to wildly different portfolios. ... These Investors Earned 20% to 33% Returns Using The Same Philosophy on Completely Different Stocks

headline: Does Kenvue (KVUE) Offer Value After Share Price Decline And DCF Upside Projection
summary: Wondering whether Kenvue at around US$17.71 offers good value or just looks cheap on the surface? This article breaks down what that price really implies for you as a shareholder. The stock has inched up 2.5% over the last week and 0.2% over the last month, yet is still down 14.7% over the past year and up 2.3% year to date. This naturally raises questions about risk, sentiment, and entry points. Recent coverage has focused on Kenvue as a stand alone consumer health company following its...
